usage.buttons: black background, white text, gold border on hover

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark sections

marketing_pages.hero_section: Full screen, large typography, cinematic imagery
marketing_pages.product_showcase: Clean grid, generous whitespace, hover reveal details

dashboard.style: Clean, functional, high contrast data visualization

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black hover:border-black border border-transparent transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.ghost: text-black hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.feature: p-8 border border-neutral-200 hover:border-black transition-colors duration-500

inputs.style: border-b border-neutral-300 focus:border-black bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-neutral-400 focus:ring-0 transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (Gold: #D4AF37) and fonts.
Install 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.css.
Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the homepage layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states that involve a color shift (Black <-> White) or Gold accent.
Implement the 'Lenis' smooth scroll library for a premium feel.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
For the Admin Dashboard, keep it clean and high-contrast (Black/White) with Gold for active states.
Do NOT use rounded corners (rounded-none) to maintain the sharp, luxury aesthetic.
Ensure the 'Gold' accent is used sparingly - only for key highlights, not as a primary background.
universal_guidelines: No gradients unless it's a subtle noise texture.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
